modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be several noticeable typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help to get a Zoom recording.

full_description_text:  
I want to get my Zoom recording.  
Not sure how to do it.  
Can someone help me with this?  
I can't find the recording anywhere.
short_description: Need help to get a Zoom recording.
description:
